text:
Created attachment 160936
Patch

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: 'bin/cpm' is referring to /wrkdirs/usr/ports/emulators/cpmtools/work/stage
*** Error code 1

To fix that, patch Makefiles for consistent DESTDIR handling, place help file into more suitable directory, respect CC and PREFIX.
